title: Why Rollins Stock Jumped 15% This Week
text: The bug slayer is rewarding its shareholders with a massive dividend hike.

title: Rollins, Inc. (ROL) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Joe Calabrese - IR Gary Rollins - Chairman and CEO Julie Bimmerman - Group VP, Finance and IR John Wilson - Vice Chairman Jerry Gahlhoff - President and COO Kenneth Krause - EVP, CFO and Treasurer Conference Call Participants Tim Mulrooney - William Blair Ashish Sabadra - RBC Capital Markets Seth Weber - Wells Fargo Securities Hans Hoffman - Jefferies Operator Greetings. Welcome to Rollins' Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Rollins' (ROL) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase YoY
text: Rollins' (ROL) third-quarter 2022 revenues increase year over year.

title: Rollins (ROL) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Rollins (ROL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10% and 2.26%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Watch These 5 Stocks That Recently Hiked Their Dividend
text: Five stocks that have recently hiked their dividend are: HUBB, MSEX, MWA, V and ROL.

title: Rollins (ROL) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Rollins' (ROL) third-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues are expected to increase year over year.

title: Here's Why a Hold Strategy is Apt for Rollins (ROL) Stock Now
text: Rollins (ROL) is benefiting from strength in all of its business lines.
